## Summary

Explain the change in 2 to 5 lines.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] New example or showcase
- [ ] Rendering behavior
- [ ] Verification behavior
- [ ] Caption generation
- [ ] Repo tooling or onboarding

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `./research-figures demo --offline`
- [ ] I checked the updated README or docs commands
- [ ] I reviewed visible output if the change affects generated figures

## Notes

Add screenshots, tradeoffs, or follow-up work if needed.
